summary: Stabilized frontend Pact consumer tests after main push CI missed the unauthenticated session request.
changed: Added shared retry options for all Pact consumer interactions
Added withBrowserApi helper for NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL setup and cleanup
Asserted response.ok in the unauthenticated session Pact test
intentionally_not_changed: Docker, nginx, DB pool, or runtime config

validations.command: npm run test -- --run src/test/pact/public-api-consumer.pact.test.ts src/test/public-api-clients.test.ts src/test/public-api-contracts.test.ts src/test/public-admin-client-gate.test.tsx src/test/public-admin-rendering.test.tsx

risks: The original failure was observed in GitHub Actions full-suite execution and did not reproduce in focused local runs.
If Pact flakes continue, isolate Pact consumer tests into a dedicated serial CI job.
recommendation: Open a PR into dev, verify CI, merge, then promote runtime-only main and verify main CI.
